cases.prompt: Unimproved land inside Mount Vernon city limits.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value, ps.improvement_building_count
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'mount vernon'
  AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) = 911
  AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
  AND ps.has_geometry = TRUE
  AND ps.acres > 0
ORDER BY ps.acres DESC
cases.title: Unimproved Land Inside Mount Vernon City Limits
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels inside Mount Vernon city limits with land use code 911 (Unimproved land inside city) and no improvements (improvement_building_count = 0).

cases.prompt: Private bare recreation lots with valid map geometry, excluding public parks, schools, cemeteries, churches, moorage, and condos.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.land_use,
    ps.acres,
    ps.assessed_value,
    ps.has_geometry,
    COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) AS improvement_building_count
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE ps.has_geometry = TRUE
    AND COALESCE(ps.acres, 0) > 0
    AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
),
excluded_land_use_codes AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(regexp_extract(COALESCE(land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1)) AS code
  FROM base
  WHERE land_use IS NOT NULL
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT
    b.parcel_number,
    b.land_use,
    b.acres,
    b.assessed_value,
    b.improvement_building_count
  FROM base b
  WHERE
    -- Exclude public parks, schools, cemeteries, churches, moorage, condos by land use code or keywords
    -- Exclude land use codes: 940 (Open space), 941 (Farm & ag conservation), 970 (Condo moorage), 190 (Vacation and cabin), 710-790 (Cultural/recreation), 912 (Unimproved land, multi-family)
    -- Also exclude land use labels containing keywords for public/institutional
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(b.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) NOT IN (940, 941, 970, 912)
    AND NOT (TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(b.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 710 AND 790)
    AND NOT LOWER(b.land_use) LIKE '%park%'
    AND NOT LOWER(b.land_use) LIKE '%school%'
    AND NOT LOWER(b.land_use) LIKE '%cemetery%'
    AND NOT LOWER(b.land_use) LIKE '%church%'
    AND NOT LOWER(b.land_use) LIKE '%moorage%'
    AND NOT LOWER(b.land_use) LIKE '%condo%'
)
SELECT
  parcel_number,
  land_use,
  acres,
  assessed_value,
  improvement_building_count
FROM filtered
ORDER BY acres DESC
cases.title: Private Bare Recreation Lots with Valid Geometry Excluding Public and Institutional Uses
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels that are private bare or recreational land with valid map geometry, excluding parcels used as public parks, schools, cemeteries, churches, moorage, and condominiums. Parcels must have no buildings or improvements and must not be public or institutional land use types.

cases.prompt: Large unincorporated unimproved land over 20 acres, outside city limits.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.improvement_building_count, ps.inside_city_limits
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE ps.inside_city_limits = FALSE
  AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) = 910
  AND ps.acres > 20
  AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
cases.title: Large Unincorporated Unimproved Land Over 20 Acres Outside City Limits
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels with unimproved land use code 910 (unimproved land county), over 20 acres, located outside city limits

cases.prompt: Sedro-Woolley commercial redevelopment parcels, not single family homes.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value, ps.city_name, ps.situs_city_state_zip
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 500 AND 699
  AND NOT TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 110 AND 119
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Commercial Redevelopment Parcels (Not Single Family Homes)
